output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Fight Back in 60 Seconds
output.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your rights and send a legally sound demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99—no signup required.
content_outline: The Silent Treatment: Why Your Landlord Is Withholding Your Deposit
Know Your Rights: What Landlords Can (and Cannot) Deduct
State-by-State Deadlines: How Long Is Too Long?
Why a Demand Letter Works Better Than Texting or Calling
How to Get Your Money Back (Plus Penalties) Without Hiring a Lawyer
key_points: Most states require landlords to return security deposits within 14 to 45 days, depending on local laws
Normal wear and tear, routine cleaning, and hypothetical damages are not valid deductions
A formal demand letter citing state statute is often enough to force immediate compliance
Deposits-Back.com generates state-specific security deposit demand letters in 60 seconds for $19.99 with no sign-up or subscription
output.cta: Stop begging for your money back. Visit Deposits-Back.com and generate your security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds. Just $19.99. No sign-up. No subscription. Just results.
output.target_audience: Problem-aware US renters who are frustrated because their landlord is withholding, delaying, or wrongfully deducting their security deposit
